The project implements cutting-edge technologies to revolutionise the field of child support. We employed state-of-the-art large language models in robot

repos.name: Keratoconus-Eye-Disease-Detection-using-Convolution-Neural-Network---CNN
repos.description: Keratoconus is a non-inflammatory eye condition in which the normally round dome-shaped clear window of the eye (cornea) progressively thins causing a cone-like bulge to develop.

repos.name: keratoconus-detection
repos.description: "Keratoconus is a progressive disease of the cornea which can lead to blindness as irregular astigmatism increases." Dataset available on - https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/elmehdi12/keratoconus-detection
